title: tragopogon kurdistanicus
intro: Tragopogon kurdistanicus, also known as the Kurdistan salsify, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tragopogon kurdistanicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
